description_long: This emergency worker is outfitted in a full-body suit with a light green color dominating the torso, arms, and upper legs, while the boots, gloves, and various pouches are a muted brown. The figure wears a black gas mask with prominent round eye lenses and a filter, and a helmet with angular, protective features. The suit includes several utility pouches and cylindrical containers attached to the belt and backpack, suggesting preparedness for hazardous environments. The backpack is bulky and features additional equipment, possibly for air filtration or communication. The overall appearance is utilitarian, with reinforced knee and shin guards, and the design prioritizes protection and functionality in urban emergency scenarios.
description: A fully equipped emergency worker in a green protective suit with brown boots, gloves, and gear, wearing a black gas mask and helmet, carrying multiple utility pouches and a large backpack.
description_view_0: Front view shows the black gas mask, helmet, green suit, brown gloves, boots, and utility pouches clearly.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the gas mask, helmet, and the bulk of the backpack and side pouches.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the full backpack, back of the helmet, and the arrangement of equipment and pouches on the belt.
description_view_3: Right side view displays the side profile of the helmet, gas mask, and the distribution of gear on the right hip and leg.
attribute_uniform_type: A full-body, light green protective suit made of heavy-duty synthetic fabric, featuring reinforced brown boots, gloves, and knee/shin guards. The suit includes multiple utility pouches and a large, structured backpack, with a black gas mask and helmet for respiratory and head protection.
attribute_helmet_or_headgear: A black helmet with angular protective features, integrated with a full-face gas mask that has round eye lenses and a central filter; the helmet appears to be made of hard plastic or composite material.
